temporal_description: A group of four men in dark suits stand in a dimly lit, wet parking lot at night. They are gathered around a dark, vintage luxury car with its headlights on. The car's license plate reads "AY 333". In the background, the blurry lights of the city and other parked vehicles are visible. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the top right corner of the screen. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the men and the front of the car. The audio is dominated by the loud, piercing wail of a police siren, creating a sense of urgency and high-stakes action. The camera pans quickly to the right, following a black car with its headlights on as it drives through the wet parking lot. The movement is shaky, suggesting a fast pan. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right. The camera settles on the black car, now stopped. A man in a light-colored shirt gets out of the driver's side, while another man in a dark shirt gets out of the passenger side. The car's license plate is now visible and reads "BL 4800". The scene is still dark, illuminated by the car's headlights. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The shot is slightly shaky, with a brief, blurry foreground element partially obscuring the view before the scene ends. The siren is followed by the sounds of a car door opening and then slamming shut with a solid, metallic thud. There is no dialogue or background music, placing all the focus on the sharp, impactful sound effects.
